sections.title: C: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30. **ON**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30. **DOWN**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30. **GONE**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30. **ALLERGIC**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30.

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30. **OVER**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Units 28, 29 and 30.
